articles.title: What's on the line as WSL reaches business end?
articles.summary: BBC Sport analyses the state of play in the Women's Super League with only a handful of games to go and the title, European qualification, relegation and promotion still to be decided.

articles.title: 'It's not done' - Arsenal back up Rice's words with crucial win
articles.summary: Arsenal deliver on Declan Rice's promise that the Premier League title race is "not done" with an important win over Newcastle.

articles.title: Three goals, eight chaotic minutes - how day of relegation drama unfolded
articles.summary: On a day of twists and turns, Tottenham and West Ham both picked up crucial wins in their fight to avoid relegation.

articles.title: Has Salah played last Liverpool game? Slot says 'wait and see'
articles.summary: Liverpool will have to "wait and see" whether Mohamed Salah has played his final game for the club, says manager Arne Slot.

articles.title: Could 'outstanding' Maeda's return to form give Celtic title edge?
articles.summary: Celtic forward Daizen Maeda is recapturing his best form as Celtic look to pip Hearts and Rangers to the Scottish Premiership title.

articles.title: Man City beat Southampton to reach FA Cup final
articles.summary: Manchester City score two goals in five minutes to secure a late comeback victory against Southampton and reach their fourth FA Cup final in a row.

articles.title: Superb Eze effort enough to see Arsenal beat Newcastle
articles.summary: An early Eberechi Eze strike proves to be the difference as Arsenal hold on to beat Newcastle United 1-0 at the Emirates Stadium and move back to the top of the Premier League table.

articles.title: Palhinha scores crucial goal to boost Spurs' survival hopes
articles.summary: Joao Palhinha's late goal earns Tottenham a vital 1-0 win over Wolves at Molineux, to keep themselves just two points behind relegation rivals West Ham United in the Premier League.

articles.title: Last-gasp Wilson winner boosts West Ham's fight for survival
articles.summary: Callum Wilson's 92nd minute winner helps West Ham United to a 2-1 win over Everton at the London Stadium, keeping the home side two points above the Premier League relegation zone.

articles.title: Isak and Wirtz on scoresheet as Liverpool beat Palace
articles.summary: Alexander Isak and Florian Wirtz both score in Liverpool's 3-1 win over Crystal Palace in the Premier League, to strengthen Arne Slot's side's chase for Champions League qualification.

articles.title: Their day, until it wasn't - the title decider that had it all
articles.summary: Two goals in stoppage time and pitch invasions by both sets of fans. The last day of the National League season lived up to its billing.

articles.title: Kinsky's save, Palhinha's relief and - finally - a Tottenham win
articles.summary: Tottenham end their long wait for a Premier League win with victory at Wolves - lifting their survival hopes in the process.

articles.title: A long time coming but something to build on - Isak's landmark goal
articles.summary: Will Alexander Isak's first Liverpool Premier League goal at Anfield prove a turning point for the £125m signing?

articles.title: Ups, downs and the race for Europe
articles.summary: All you need to know about promotion, relegation and qualification for Europe in England and Scotland's top men's football leagues, and the Women's Super League.

articles.title: Sessegnon strike helps Fulham sink Villa
articles.summary: Ryan Sessegnon's first-half strike leads Fulham to a 1-0 victory against Aston Villa at Craven Cottage in the Premier League, to strengthen Marco Silva's side's push for European football next season.

highlights.title: Premier League highlights this week - Week Highlights

articles.title: St Helens level with Leeds atop the Super League after Wakefield win
articles.summary: Highlights from the Betfred Super League clash between St Helens and Wakefield Trinity.

articles.title: Oxford relegated after two years in Championship
articles.summary: Oxford United are relegated with one game of the season remaining after Charlton Athletic beat Hull City.

articles.title: Korda remains five shots clear at Chevron Championship ahead of final round
articles.summary: Nelly Korda remains five shots clear at the Chevron Championship and in poll position ahead of the final round despite failing to reach the heights of her stunning opening two rounds.

articles.title: World Snooker Championship scores and schedule
articles.summary: The 2026 World Snooker Championship is under way, as Ronnie O’Sullivan bids for a record-breaking eighth world title and Zhao Xintong attempts to defend his crown.

articles.title: O'Sullivan opens up four-frame lead vs Higgins after first session
articles.summary: Ronnie O'Sullivan carved out a 6-2 overnight lead against old foe John Higgins in the first session of their second-round showdown at the World Snooker Championship in Sheffield.

articles.title: St Helens go level with Leeds at top of Super League after Wakefield win
articles.summary: St Helens went joint top of Super League alongside Leeds Rhinos as they hung on for an 18-12 win at home to Wakefield Trinity on Saturday.
